name: Morphine sulfate
description: Opioid analgesic. Na-enye ihe mgbu dị irè ma na-akpata vasodilation na hypotension - jiri nlezianya mee ihe na ujo hemorrhagic. A na-ahọrọ Ketamine na ntọala ọgụ. Jiri morphine naanị na ndị ọrịa hemodynamically kwụsiri ike.
indications: Ihe mgbu na-agafeghị oke na nke siri ike na ndị ọrịa hemodynamically kwụsiri ike
Ọ bụghị ahịrị mbụ na TCCC --ahọrọ ketamine
dose: 2-4 mg IV/IO q4h PRN. Titrate na-arụ ọrụ. IM: 5-10 mg q4h PRN.
contraindications: Mmerụ isi na LOC gbanwere (ndị ikwu)
warnings: Na-ebute vasodilation - nwere ike ime ka ujo hemorrhagic dịkwuo njọ. Nyochaa BP tupu na mgbe emechara.
Ịda mbà n'obi iku ume -- ọnụego nyochaa.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV q2-4h PRN. Oke otu dose 2mg IV na nwa opioid-naive.
pediatric.note: Nyochaa ọnụego iku ume nke ọma. Ụmụ ọhụrụ na-enwe mmetụta nke ukwuu.

obstetric.note: Na-agafe placenta. Enwere ike ịda mbà n'obi iku ume nwa ọhụrụ ma ọ bụrụ na enyere ya n'ime awa 2-4 nke ọmụmụ. Nwee naloxone dị njikere maka nwa amụrụ ọhụrụ.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / PHTLS
